revision.comment: 同様に「ページの作成」も追えるように改修
revision.text:
'''カテゴリグラフ'''
'''上位'''カテゴリ: [https://vcat.toolforge.org/render?wiki=jawiki&rel=category&links=wiki&format=svg&category={{BASEPAGENAMEE}} SVG形式] · [https://vcat.toolforge.org/render?wiki=jawiki&rel=category&links=wiki&format=png&category={{BASEPAGENAMEE}} PNG形式]
{{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:{{PAGENAME}} |R |subcats}} |0 | | '''下位'''カテゴリ: [https://vcat.toolforge.org/render?wiki=jawiki&rel=subcategory&links=wiki&format=svg&category={{BASEPAGENAMEE}} SVG形式] · [https://vcat.toolforge.org/render?wiki=jawiki&rel=subcategory&links=wiki&format=png&category={{BASEPAGENAMEE}} PNG形式] }}
'''特別'''
[https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/特別:関連ページの更新状況?hidebots=1&hidepageedits=1&hideWikibase=1&hidelog=1&target={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}&limit=999&days=30&categorization=1&urlversion=2 関連ページの更新状況]
[https://petscan.wmflabs.org/?language=ja&project=wikipedia&depth={{{深度|10}}}&ns%5B0%5D=1&ns%5B6%5D=1&ns%5B10%5D=1&ns%5B100%5D=1&sortby=ns_title&interface_language=ja&categories={{BASEPAGENAMEE}} PetScanツール]
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
'''カテゴリグラフ'''
'''上位'''カテゴリ: [https://vcat.toolforge.org/render?wiki=jawiki&rel=category&links=wiki&format=svg&category={{BASEPAGENAMEE}} SVG形式] · [https://vcat.toolforge.org/render?wiki=jawiki&rel=category&links=wiki&format=png&category={{BASEPAGENAMEE}} PNG形式]
